---
title: "emu660-spring2026-feyzaunal_account"
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.
---
title: "EMU660 - Feyza Ünal"
format: html
---

# Welcome

Welcome to my EMU660 course website.

This website contains my assignments and project work for theEMU 660 course

# About Me
My name is Feyza Ünal.
I am a student in the EMU660 course.

# Assignments
- Assignment 1
- Assignment 2
- Assignment 3
